calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Linda Chavez
Atty. Donald Bloom appearing for the Petitioner Evelyn Bautista was sworn and examined. Petitioner is the grandmother and guardian of minor Gabriela Marie Onia.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor by guardian to: GABRIELA MARIE ONIA FAVILA. Decree signed in open court.
